General.Name: Dongjiang Environmental Co Ltd
General.Description: Dongjiang Environmental Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides environmental services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through eight segments, Industrial Waste Resource Utilization, Industrial Waste Treatment and Disposal, Rare Metal Recycling, Municipal Waste Treatment and Disposal, Renewable Energy Utilization, Environmental Engineering and Services, Electronic Waste Dismantling, and Others. The company provides waste identification, industrial wastes recycling and utilization, and industrial waste treatment; municipal solid waste treatment and renewable energy utilization; and engineering, environmental remediation, and environmental monitoring services. It also manufactures metal salt products, such as feed grade copper sulfate, basic copper chloride, electroplating grade copper sulfate, copper oxide, copper hydroxide, copper sulfide, tin hydroxide, nickel carbonate, and ammonium chloride. In addition, the company is involved in renewable energy; waste electrical appliance disassembling and utilization; and environmental protection services. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Dongjiang Environmental Company Limited and changed its name to Dongjiang Environmental Company Limited in December 2010. Dongjiang Environmental Company Limited was founded in 1999 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
